name: Raw PCM to WAV PCM
summary: Zero-dependency wrapping and canonicalization of parameterized raw integer PCM as RIFF/WAVE PCM.

scope: Finite interleaved integer raw PCM with explicit parameters
out_of_scope: Automatic inference of raw PCM parameters
Planar, floating-point, companded or DSD input
RF64, BW64, BWF metadata or WAVE_FORMAT_EXTENSIBLE output

guarantees: Complete input sample values, frame order and channel order are preserved
Byte order and signedness are normalized to WAVE PCM conventions
Header sizes are derived before output begins
tradeoffs: Raw PCM interpretation necessarily depends on caller parameters

properties: Declared data size equals emitted complete-frame bytes
Multi-byte endian reversal is an involution
regression: Signed 8-bit input becomes unsigned WAVE PCM
Unsigned 16-bit input is rebased to signed WAVE PCM
fuzz: Planned: option, length, seek and fragmented-reader campaigns

limits: channels default to a maximum of 256
classic RIFF data is bounded to 32-bit chunk sizes
all frame, rate and output arithmetic is checked
known_risks: Seek or output I/O errors may occur after the WAV header is written
